detail.description: Austin Slater doubles (3) on a fly ball to left fielder Jose Siri.
Austin Slater singles on a ground ball to second baseman Vaughn Grissom. Tyrone Taylor to 2nd.
Austin Slater doubles (1) on a line drive to left fielder Josh Lowe.
Austin Slater singles on a ground ball to third baseman Yoán Moncada.
Austin Slater doubles (2) on a ground ball to third baseman Caleb Durbin, deflected by pitcher Jake Bennett. Taylor Walls scores. Yandy Díaz to 3rd.

Austin Slater singles on a soft ground ball to third baseman Caleb Durbin. Ryan Vilade out at 3rd, third baseman Caleb Durbin to second baseman Isiah Kiner-Falefa to shortstop Marcelo Mayer to second baseman Isiah Kiner-Falefa.
Austin Slater singles on a ground ball to third baseman Caleb Durbin.
Austin Slater singles on a ground ball to third baseman Zach McKinstry.
Austin Slater singles on a fly ball to center fielder Javier Báez.
Austin Slater singles on a ground ball to second baseman Edouard Julien.
Austin Slater singles on a line drive to right fielder Troy Johnston.
Austin Slater singles on a sharp ground ball to left fielder Ryan Ward.
Austin Slater singles on a line drive to left fielder Ryan Ward.
Austin Slater singles on a ground ball to center fielder Trent Grisham.
Austin Slater singles on a line drive to left fielder Cody Bellinger.
